overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring an industrial interior. The character walks through a corridor with views of a red planet through windows, approaches a service counter with items, then continues toward a secure access door.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with illuminated service counters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the service counter ahead

entered.detail: large window showing red planet surface and rocky terrain outside
long counter with glowing white top surface and edge lighting
heavy industrial door with warning stripes and secure access panel
posters and informational signs mounted on the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor with metal walls and floors. A large window on the left reveals a red planet surface outside. Ahead, an illuminated service counter and a secure access door are visible in the distance.

events.description: character slows down while approaching the service counter
character examines weapon and containers on the illuminated counter

agents.ego_description: approaching the counter and closely examining the items displayed on the illuminated surface

entered.detail: rifle or long gun lying horizontally on the counter surface
small cylindrical containers positioned near the weapon

segments.scene_description: The character slows down and approaches the illuminated service counter. A weapon and several small containers are visible on the counter's glowing surface. The character stops to examine these items closely.

events.description: character turns away from counter and resumes walking toward the secure access door

agents.ego_description: walking away from the counter toward the secure access door at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: large green industrial container with white lid positioned against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the counter and walks down the corridor toward the secure access door. A green storage container is visible on the left side. The secure door with its warning markings grows larger as the character approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile industrial corridor that transitions from a wide view of a red planet to a close-up inspection of equipment before ending at a secure bulkhead. It begins with the character walking past a large window revealing a crimson planetary surface, moving steadily toward a distant, glowing service counter. As the character slows down, the camera closes in on the illuminated surface of the counter to examine a weapon and several small containers. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the items and continues down the hall, passing a green storage container on the left. Finally, the camera advances toward the secure access door, which grows larger in the frame as its warning markings become clearly visible.
